coordination_skills: wait for the specialist before opening vault hazards
announce optional loot before taking it
protect the key or blade carrier on exit
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the specialist sequencing and greed control signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first specialist sequencing and greed control choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on specialist sequencing and greed control without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A compact vault where one hero scouts reflection, the other handles hazard, and the token may need a handoff.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Moonblade Vault variant while preserving the specialist sequencing and greed control signal.
